Deployed instances of Datasette prior to `0.65.2` and `1.0a21` include an open redirect vulnerability.

Hits to the path `//example.com/foo/bar/` (the trailing slash is required) will redirect the user to `https://example.com/foo/bar`.

### Patches

This problem has been patched in both Datasette `0.65.2` and `1.0a21`.

### Workarounds

If Datasette is running behind a proxy that proxy could be configured to replace `//` with `/` in incoming request URLs.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00389, "percentile": 0.30948}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-w832-gg5g-x44m", "github_reviewed_at": "2025-11-06T15:13:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w832-gg5g-x44m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-w832-gg5g-x44m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-64481"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-11-07T21:15:42Z", "published_at": "2025-11-06T15:13:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/simonw/datasette/security/advisories/GHSA-w832-gg5g-x44m", "https://github.com/simonw/datasette/issues/2429", "https://github.com/simonw/datasette/commit/f257ca6edb64848c3b04b54d41e347c54fe57c05", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-64481", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/datasette/PYSEC-2025-73.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w832-gg5g-x44m"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/simonw/datasette/security-advisories/GHSA-w832-gg5g-x44m", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/simonw/datasette", "summary": "Open redirect endpoint in Datasette", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T20:23:12Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-w832-gg5g-x44m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.65.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "datasette"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.65.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "1.0a21", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "datasette"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.0a0, < 1.0a20"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Open redirect endpoint in Datasette
